evals.prompt: Build a premium multilingual message wall demo where each text bubble knows its height before paint. The result should feel compact and editorial, not like a generic dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A complete predictive-ui demo that uses Pretext in the sizing path and produces width-tight message bubbles without DOM text measurement.

evals.prompt: Create a typography-heavy landing page hero where the headline and body text route around floating circular artwork and reflow cleanly on resize.
evals.expected_output: An editorial-routing demo with obstacle-aware text flow, visible composition, and responsive rerouting.

evals.prompt: Make a canvas-based kinetic typography poster where measured text reacts to pointer movement and settles back into its original line layout.
evals.expected_output: A kinetic-typography demo where motion is anchored to Pretext-derived line or glyph positions rather than decorative-only animation.

evals.prompt: Build a compact editorial bulletin with masonry-like cards whose text heights are computed before layout. It should feel intentional and premium rather than like a dashboard.
evals.expected_output: A predictive-ui demo where card packing depends on Pretext layout results instead of post-render DOM measurement.

evals.prompt: Create an article spread where a large circular pull quote interrupts the column and the body copy reroutes around it line by line.
evals.expected_output: An editorial-routing demo where obstacle-aware line layout is the central behavior and the composition still works on resize.

evals.prompt: Create a canvas poster where measured text anchors drive an animated ASCII ribbon field with restrained but obvious pointer interaction.
evals.expected_output: A kinetic-typography demo with a strong poster-like visual system and motion tied to Pretext-derived text structure.
